title: luzula multiflora subsp. tenella
intro: Luzula multiflora subsp. tenella, also known as Woodrush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Luzula multiflora subsp. tenella include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and muscle spasms. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
